basic_details.job_title: ICAR CRRI Young Professional I Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: ICAR Central Rice Research Institute (ICAR CRRI) has released the official Young Professional I Notification 2026 at https://icar-nrri.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the ICAR CRRI Young Professional I Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged 21 to 45 years with a B.Sc. in Agriculture/ Botany/ Biotechnology or M.Sc. (Agriculture/ Botany/ Biotechnology) along with experience in field experimentation, data collection, and computer skills can attend the walk-in interview on 08 July 2026. The official notification PDF and walk-in interview details are provided below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation as per rule for SC, ST and OBC

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. in Agriculture / Botany / Biotechnology, M.Sc. (Agriculture / Botany / Biotechnology), Experience in field experimentation and data collection, Knowledge of computer skills (MS Word, Excel, Power point etc.)
qualification.details: B.Sc. in Agriculture / Botany / Biotechnology M.Sc. (Agriculture / Botany / Biotechnology) Experience in field experimentation and data collection Knowledge of computer skills (MS Word, Excel, Power point etc.)

selection_process: Written-cum-personal interview Screening test (if large number of candidates)

_labels.notification_pdf: Download ICAR-CRRI Young Professional I (YP-I) Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download ICAR-CRRI Young Professional I (YP-I) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ICAR-CRRI Young Professional I Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.icar_central_rice_research_institute_cut: B.Sc. in Agriculture / Botany / Biotechnology, M.Sc. (Agriculture / Botany / Biotechnology), Experience in field experimentation and data collection, Knowledge of computer skills (MS Word, Excel, Power point etc.)

content_sections.heading: ICAR-CRRI Young Professional I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ICAR-CRRI Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download ICAR-CRRI Young Professional I (YP-I) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: B.Sc. in Agriculture / Botany / Biotechnology M.Sc. (Agriculture / Botany / Biotechnology) Experience in field experimentation and data collection Knowledge of computer skills (MS Word, Excel, Power point etc.)

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation as per rule for SC, ST and OBC

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Written-cum-personal interview Screening test (if large number of candidates)

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for ICAR-CRRI Young Professional-I (YP-I) Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: ICAR-CRRI Young Professional I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the ICAR-CRRI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The post name for the ICAR-CRRI Recruitment 2026 is Young Professional-I (YP-I). This position offers a great opportunity for eligible candidates to join a prestigious government organization.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Young Professional-I (YP-I) at ICAR-CRRI?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy announced for the Young Professional-I (YP-I) post in the ICAR-CRRI recruitment drive. Interested candidates should apply promptly.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for ICAR-CRRI Young Professional-I (YP-I) posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Young Professional-I (YP-I) posts at ICAR-CRRI is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly on the specified date.

faq.question: Q4. What is the walk-in interview date for ICAR-CRRI Young Professional-I (YP-I) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Young Professional-I (YP-I) position at ICAR-CRRI is scheduled for 08 July 2026. Candidates must report on time with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Young Professional-I (YP-I) post?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for the Young Professional-I (YP-I) post should be between 21 and 45 years of age. Age relaxation will be applicable as per government rules for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for Young Professional-I (YP-I) at ICAR-CRRI?
faq.answer: The selected Young Professional-I (YP-I) will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000 per month. This is a contractual position with a competitive remuneration package.

faq.question: Q7. What are the essential qualifications for Young Professional-I (YP-I)?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Sc. in Agriculture / Botany / Biotechnology, or M.Sc. (Agriculture / Botany / Biotechnology). Experience in field experimentation and computer skills are also required.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for the ICAR-CRRI Young Professional-I (YP-I) recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the ICAR-CRRI Young Professional-I (YP-I) recruitment. This makes it accessible for all eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for Young Professional-I (YP-I) at ICAR-CRRI?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Written-cum-personal interview. A screening test may also be conducted if there is a large number of candidates attending the walk-in interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where will the walk-in interview for ICAR-CRRI Young Professional-I (YP-I) be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at ICAR-Central Rice Research Institute, Cuttack, Odisha. Candidates should check the official notification for the exact venue address and reporting time.
